title: agrostis imberbis
intro: Agrostis imberbis, also known as dew hair-grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving coughs, and treating respiratory issues. Agrostis imberbis can be prepared as an herbal tea by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water, or as a decoction by boiling the roots and stems in water.
